settings.risk_3_to_1_port_rule: 3:1 port bonus only if opponent lacks 3:1; high value requires surplus production in resource(s) not already covered by existing 2:1 ports.
settings.risk_opponent_move_viability_rule: Stage 4C ranks each contested target among the opponent's visible settlement options. Low-value or low-priority opponent moves are penalized before High/Medium/Low risk is assigned.
settings.risk_stage4D_combined_action_rule: Stage 4D exposes action_risk_level/source and risk-adjusted total/gain fields. Raw total_expected_own_turns is unchanged; risk_adjusted_total_expected_own_turns adds a small penalty.
settings.strategy_preference_rule: Pick a preferred way_id from continuation rows using risk-adjusted total turns and risk-adjusted net gain. Payment-unreliable rows may still define a provisional strategic direction, but should not trigger automatic action execution.
